title: Crisp Filipino Garlic Stir-fry
description: A floral and crisp Filipino dish featuring garlic granules for a post-workout meal with low-sodium options.

ingredients.name: Pepper
ingredients.amount: A few grinds of black pepper

instructions: Toss mixed greens with garlic granules and a pinch of salt for flavoring.
Spread the green mixture evenly on a baking sheet.
Drizzle mixed greens lightly with low-sodium soy sauce and sesame oil, ensuring even coverage.
Broil in the preheated oven until the leaves are just tender and crisp, about 3-5 minutes.
Remove from broiler and add pepper to taste before serving.
